seedanceSegments.title: Roast hook and oven insert
seedanceSegments.description: Juice-bead macro hook, pan reveal, quick balsamic thread, overhead layout, tray into open oven.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context (not as mandatory wide framing). Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for overhead berry and parchment actions. Use @OvenWide for already-open oven tray insert only. Use @OvenCloseup for roast bubble macro. Use @BakingMat for parchment-lined sheet topology. Use @RoastedStrawberriesJammy only as target jammy roast color and syrup gloss reference, not before roast completes. Kitchen continuity lock: light terrazzo countertop, same Licorn cabinet layout, no invented wood counters. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, texture-first opening, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only close-up kitchen ASMR synchronized with cuts. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s extreme macro juice bead on halved strawberry cut face; 0.8-1.6s pull back to halved berries on parchment heat shimmer; 1.6-2.1s quick balsamic thread on berries; 2.1-3.0s overhead even layer on sheet pan; 3.0-4.0s tray slides into already-open oven, no door close; 4.0-5.0s roast macro bubbles and darkening edges begin. Scale lock: halved strawberries about 2-3 cm wide each, about 20-24 halves on half sheet, not oversized berries, not miniature. Global negatives: no mise en place lineup, no ingredient flatlay hook, no text, no music, no speech, no oven door slam, no character face in opening.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening texture-first; scene 2 pays off scene 1 berry geometry. Terrazzo and oven geometry locked.

seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: tiny wet pop; parchment rustle; soft tray slide; bubble sizzle

seedanceSegments.title: Jammy roast payoff and transfer
seedanceSegments.description: Roast macro, jammy collapse, steam, cooling glossy pool, spatula transfer scrape to bowl.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for cooling pan overhead. Use @KitchenIslandDefault for terrazzo island identity during transfer. Use @OvenCloseup for roast and steam macros. Use @BakingMat for parchment syrup pool topology. Use @RoastedStrawberriesJammy as jammy collapsed berry and ruby syrup state lock. Use @SiliconeSpatula only as flexible scraper shape for transfer, not for folding batter. Kitchen continuity lock: same light terrazzo, same parchment mat family. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s roast macro dark edges and bubbling syrup; 1.2-2.2s jammy center collapse squeeze without smashing whole berries; 2.2-3.0s steam wisps over glossy pool; 3.0-4.0s cooling tray glossy red lake on island; 4.0-6.0s spatula scrapes berries and syrup into bowl with stretch. Scale lock: berry halves remain 2-3 cm wide, syrup pool on standard half sheet scale, not oversized. Utensil lock: flexible scraper only, tool-first hands, no cloth fused with fingers. Global negatives: no grainy ice crystals yet, no popsicle mold, no bite, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Berry scale and syrup gloss match segment-01. Terrazzo unchanged.

seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: bubble sizzle; wet squish; soft hiss; sticky scrape

seedanceSegments.title: Chunky puree and silky cream base
seedanceSegments.description: Pulse chunky puree, maple into puree, spoon lift, coconut pour, whisk cream, maple into cream, vanilla and salt accents, ribbon lift.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for all bowl and processor macros. Use @Blender only as processor bowl shape. Use @Whisk only for cream whisking. Use @Spoon only for lifts and pours. Use @ChunkyStrawberryPuree as chunky pink puree state lock with visible seeds. Use @CoconutCreamSwirlBase as silky white cream ribbon state lock. Kitchen continuity lock: same terrazzo island. Generate exactly 9 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s chunky pulse in processor; 0.9-1.6s maple stream into pink puree; 1.6-2.3s spoon lifts chunky puree with seeds; 2.3-3.1s thick coconut milk pour into bowl; 3.1-4.0s whisk ripples; 4.0-4.8s maple spiral into white cream; 4.8-5.4s vanilla drop ring; 5.4-5.9s salt pinch; 5.9-7.0s whisk ribbon trails fall. Scale lock: processor bowl about 18-22 cm wide on counter, not miniature. Puree must stay chunky not smooth sorbet. Global negatives: no smooth pink sorbet, no curdled gray coconut, no character face, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Pink puree color matches roasted berry arc. Cream stays thick white, not gray.

seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: processor thud; thick pour; whisk rasp; creamy fold

seedanceSegments.title: Swirl layers in mold
seedanceSegments.description: Mold prep context, pink and white spoon layers, marbled streaks, filled mold overhead, stick insert.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for mold filling macros. Use @KitchenIslandDefault for wider mold prep context. Use @Spoon only for dollops and streaks. Use @PopsicleMoldLayeredFill as mold cavity geometry and pink-white layer state lock. Use @CoconutCreamSwirlBase for white cream texture only. Use @ChunkyStrawberryPuree for pink layer texture only. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only for visible hands on spoon and stick, not face close-up. Kitchen continuity lock: terrazzo island unchanged. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s context mold and two bowls on island; 1.0-2.2s first pink puree spoon into cavity bottom; 2.2-3.4s white cream spooned on pink with soft boundary; 3.4-4.6s second pink streak through white; 4.6-5.8s overhead multiple cavities marbled, about 6-8 cavities visible; 5.8-7.0s wooden stick pressed into semi-set surface; 7.0-8.0s hold on marbled fills before freeze hard cut hint. Scale lock: silicone bar mold cavities about 10-12 cm deep and 2.5-3 cm wide each, 8-10 cavities on mold, not oversized pops, not miniature. Global negatives: no fully frozen ice yet, no bite, no melting drip, no text, no music, no character touching finished pops.

seedanceSegments.title: Freeze, release, and surface macro
seedanceSegments.description: Frosty mold hard cut, warm-water rim, intact pop release, streaked surface macro, trio on board.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for mold frost and release macros. Use @KitchenIslandDefault for trio board context. Use @Spoon only if needed for lift echo, optional. Use @FrozenPopsicleStreaked as intact frozen pop geometry and streak bands lock. Use @PopsicleMoldLayeredFill only for pre-freeze to post-freeze hard cut contrast on mold exterior. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only for hands during release, not touching hero trio. Kitchen continuity lock: same terrazzo. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s hard cut to frosty mold exterior matte crystals; 1.2-2.2s warm water condensation on mold rim only; 2.2-3.6s intact pop slides free on stick with pink-white streaks, no bite; 3.6-5.0s extreme macro frost and streak bands on pop surface; 5.0-7.0s three intact pops in board holder, motionless. Scale lock: pop about 10-12 cm long and 2.5-3 cm wide, not oversized, not miniature. Destructive release allowed here; no bite, no melting drip on pop. Global negatives: no bite taken, no spoon diving into pop, no sauce drip on hero, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Pop streak geometry must match FinalDishVisual. Release and bite stay out of segment-06.

seedanceSegments.title: Hero lock before celebration
seedanceSegments.description: Wide island hero, side streak bands, character satisfaction without touching pops, frost sparkle, puree callback, final motionless trio for outro handoff.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as active hero island view and terrazzo lock. Use @FinalDishVisual as finished dish identity: three intact streaked pops in board holder, motionless on counter. Use @FrozenPopsicleStreaked for side streak band geometry on a single pop. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterRight for satisfied character glance only; character does NOT touch the pops. Use @ChunkyStrawberryPuree only for quick color callback spoon lift, no eating. Kitchen continuity lock: light terrazzo unchanged. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no extra shots, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s wide island hero 3-4 intact pops and mold set aside; 1.2-2.4s side view streak bands on single intact pop, no bite; 2.4-3.6s character three-quarter satisfied glance, hands away from pops; 3.6-4.4s frost crystal sparkle macro; 4.4-5.2s quick chunky puree ribbon callback; 5.2-6.0s final motionless trio centered on terrazzo, intact, no hands, no garnish drop. Scale lock: pops remain 10-12 cm long, not oversized, not miniature. Segment must end with dish intact and motionless matching @FinalDishVisual. Global negatives: no bite, no spoon dive into pop, no melting drip, no character touching dish, no garnish drop on pops, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Licorn celebration outro
seedanceSegments.description: Standardized Licorn celebration outro; app injects canonical prompt at sync.
